channel.title: Cautious Optimism Briefings
channel.description: Expert-level daily audio briefings for a sophisticated listener fluent in economics, capital markets, technology, artificial intelligence, and digital assets. Each episode leads with what is genuinely new or non-consensus and favors analysis over recap. One signal at a time.
channel.itunes:summary: Expert-level daily audio briefings for a sophisticated listener fluent in economics, capital markets, technology, artificial intelligence, and digital assets. Each episode leads with what is genuinely new or non-consensus and favors analysis over recap. One signal at a time.
channel.itunes:author: Cautious Optimism

item.title: Strategic Power, Energy, and Institutional Change — July 8, 2026
item.description: Strategic power: transformers as the binding constraint (DPA finding), AI power demand, China's $295B sovereign compute grid, and the November rare-earth expiry.
item.itunes:summary: Strategic power: transformers as the binding constraint (DPA finding), AI power demand, China's $295B sovereign compute grid, and the November rare-earth expiry.

item.title: Digital Money, Crypto, and Market Structure — July 8, 2026
item.description: Digital money: Bitcoin's macro-driven bounce to ~$64k on thin flows, while GENIUS Act implementation, USDC's share gains, reserve money-market funds, and Open USD rewire the plumbing.
item.itunes:summary: Digital money: Bitcoin's macro-driven bounce to ~$64k on thin flows, while GENIUS Act implementation, USDC's share gains, reserve money-market funds, and Open USD rewire the plumbing.

item.title: Capital Markets Cross-Asset Radar — July 8, 2026
item.description: Cross-asset radar into the June FOMC minutes: Warsh's no-dot hawkish hold vs. a soft 57k payrolls print, a 40-year-low yen, tight credit, and a higher-vol rates regime.
item.itunes:summary: Cross-asset radar into the June FOMC minutes: Warsh's no-dot hawkish hold vs. a soft 57k payrolls print, a 40-year-low yen, tight credit, and a higher-vol rates regime.

item.title: Frontier AI Lab Competition — July 8, 2026
item.description: GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) previews with a cost attack on Anthropic; Google delays Gemini 3.5 for a rebuild; Anthropic's $965B round; China's open-weight surge and the end of the H20.
item.itunes:summary: GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) previews with a cost attack on Anthropic; Google delays Gemini 3.5 for a rebuild; Anthropic's $965B round; China's open-weight surge and the end of the H20.
